meaning: n.沼泽,湿地,煤层聚水v.陷入沼泽,淹没,覆没
examples: The site for the airport will be reclaimed from the swamp.
I spent one whole night by a swamp behind the road listening to frogs.
Elephants were often to be found in swamp in eastern Kenya around the Tana River.
Tax rate moves are inherently local issues, and global factors nearly always swamp local.
Its upward swing will swamp any late-stage bear market vicissitudes as they always do.
